---
description: "Use when discovering Caracal policy requirements, actors, resources, scopes, allow cases, deny cases, exceptions, and missing information before authoring a data document."
---
# Requirement Discovery

- Identify the data document needed.
- Identify the protected resource and requested scopes.
- Identify the actor, application, subject, session, grant, and delegation context.
- Translate business requirements into grant data and confinement or restriction overlays.
- Identify exceptions, overrides, and fallback behavior.
- Ask for missing fields, sample policy input, existing policy, or documentation when needed.

Do not author a data document until requirements and inputs are clear.
